text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship seems less chipper than usual.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Mayday, mayday. This is Gold Ship.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I am out of fuel. I repeat, I am out of fuel.
Switching to low power mode. Over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I should probably adjust her racing schedule...
